_comment: Educational content only. No dosage, no synthesis, no sourcing information — by design. Grounded in WHO harm-reduction guidance and NDA Zimbabwe public reporting; content should be reviewed by an NDA/CIDAZ clinical partner before production use.

substances.name: Cannabis
substances.risks_short_en: Can affect memory, concentration and motivation; higher risk of anxiety or psychosis in people with a personal or family history of mental illness; smoke inhalation harms the lungs.
substances.risks_short_sn: Inogona kukanganisa ndangariro nekufunga; inowedzera njodzi yekufunganya kana pane nhoroondo yehukama yekurwara kwepfungwa; utsi hunokuvadza mapapu.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_en: If you choose to use, avoid mixing with alcohol or other depressants, avoid driving, and take breaks between uses. If it starts affecting school, work or relationships, that is a sign to talk to someone.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_sn: Kana ukasarudza kushandisa, usasanganisa nedoro kana mimwe mishonga inodzikamisa; usatyaira; zorora pakati penguva dzekushandisa. Kana ikatanga kukanganisa chikoro kana basa, taura nemumwe munhu.
substances.legal_status_zw: Illegal under Zimbabwean law outside of licensed medicinal/industrial hemp production.

substances.name: Nyaope / Guka
substances.risks_short_en: A street cocktail (often containing low-grade heroin and other cutting agents) that is highly addictive; stopping suddenly without medical support can cause severe withdrawal, including seizures.
substances.risks_short_sn: Inodhaka zvakanyanya; kurega pakarepo pasina rubatsiro rwazvokwadi kunogona kukonzera kudedera kwakanyanya, kusanganisira kufofa.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_en: Never use alone. Withdrawal from guka can be medically dangerous — this needs supervised support, not a sudden unsupported stop. Speak to an NDA-affiliated clinic before stopping on your own.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_sn: Usaishandisa uri wega. Kurega guka kunogona kuve nengozi kuhutano — tsvaga rubatsiro kuchipatara chine ruzivo rwe NDA usati waedza kurega uri wega.

substances.name: Codeine Cough Syrup ("Mutoriro")
substances.risks_short_en: Contains codeine, an opioid — misuse can cause dangerous slowed breathing, dependence, and organ damage from other ingredients in the syrup; it is not "safe because it's medicine."
substances.risks_short_sn: Ine codeine, mushonga we-opioid — kushandisa zvisiri izvo kunogona kukanganisa kufema, kudhaka, uye kukuvadza zvimwe zviropa zvemuviri.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_en: This is a myth worth repeating: cough syrup misuse is not automatically safer than other drugs because it comes from a pharmacy. If you or a friend are using large amounts regularly, that is a medical situation.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_sn: Kunyorora uku hakuna kuchengetedzeka nekuti kunobva kuchitoro chemishonga. Kana iwe kana shamwari yako muchishandisa zvakawanda nguva dzose, iyi inyaya yehutano inoda rubatsiro.
substances.legal_status_zw: Legal as medicine when prescribed/dispensed appropriately; misuse and unregulated resale is illegal.

substances.name: Inhalants (Glue / Paint / Solvents)
substances.risks_short_en: Can cause sudden heart problems even on a first use ("sudden sniffing death"), brain damage with repeated use, and severe risk when used in enclosed spaces.
substances.risks_short_sn: Inogona kukonzera dambudziko rebvudzi rekamwe kamwe kunyangwe pakushandiswa kwekutanga, uye kukuvadza uropi kana zvichiramba zvichishandiswa.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_en: This is one of the highest-immediate-risk categories in this list. If someone has just used inhalants and seems confused, dizzy, or is struggling to breathe, treat it as an emergency.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_sn: Kana mumwe munhu achangoshandisa uye achiratidza kuvhunduka, kudzungaira, kana kutadza kufema, ibata senyaya inokurumidza kuda rubatsiro.
substances.legal_status_zw: Legal to purchase for intended use (e.g. glue, paint); inhalant misuse is not a controlled-substance offence but is treated as a public-health harm.

substances.name: Crystal Methamphetamine
substances.risks_short_en: Highly addictive stimulant; can cause severe anxiety, paranoia, heart strain, and dental/skin damage with repeated use.
substances.risks_short_sn: Inodhaka zvakanyanya uye inogona kukonzera kutya kwakanyanya, kufunganya kusina hunhu, nedambudziko remwoyo.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_en: Avoid using alone; stay hydrated and cool if you do use, as overheating is a real risk; talk to NDA if use is becoming frequent.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_sn: Usaishandisa uri wega; nwa mvura zhinji uye chengeta muviri wako uchitonhorera.

substances.name: Cocaine
substances.risks_short_en: Stimulant with real cardiac risk, including in first-time or occasional users; risk increases sharply when mixed with alcohol.
substances.risks_short_sn: Inogona kukuvadza mwoyo kunyangwe pakushandisa kwekutanga; njodzi inowedzera kana zvasanganiswa nedoro.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_en: Never mix with alcohol or other stimulants. Chest pain, an irregular heartbeat, or severe agitation after use are emergency signs.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_sn: Usasanganisa nedoro. Kurwadziwa muchipfuva, mwoyo kurova zvisina tsika, kana kushatirwa kwakanyanya mushure mekushandisa ndezvekukurumidza kutsvaga rubatsiro.

substances.name: "Pink" (Tusi / Pink Cocaine Mix)
substances.risks_short_en: Street name for an unpredictable mixture that may contain several different drugs — you often cannot know what is actually in it, which makes the risk of a dangerous reaction or overdose especially high.
substances.risks_short_sn: Zita rechitoro rezvakasanganiswa zvisingazivikanwe — kazhinji hauzivi zviri mukati, izvi zvinowedzera njodzi yekukuvara kana kudhakwa zvakanyanya.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_en: Because contents are unpredictable, the safest information we can give is: the risk is genuinely unknown and higher than single-substance use. If someone becomes unresponsive after using it, treat it as an emergency immediately.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_sn: Nekuti zviri mukati hazvizivikanwe, chokwadi chatinogona kukupa ndechekuti njodzi yacho haizivikanwe uye yakakwirira. Kana mumwe munhu akasazokwanisa kupindura mushure mekunwa, ibata sedambudziko rinoda rubatsiro pakarepo.

substances.name: Alcohol
substances.risks_short_en: Legal but not risk-free — heavy or frequent use affects the liver, mental health, and judgement; mixing with other depressants (including cough syrup) increases overdose risk.
substances.risks_short_sn: Rinotenderwa pamutemo asi harina kuchengetedza zvachose — kunwa kwakawandisa kunokanganisa chiropa nehutano hwepfungwa.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_en: Never mix with sedatives, opioids, or cough syrup. Pace drinking, eat before and during, and have a friend who is not drinking check in on you.
substances.harm_reduction_tips_sn: Usasanganisa nemishonga inodzikamisa kana mutoriro. Nwa zvishoma nezvishoma uye udye chikafu.
substances.legal_status_zw: Legal for adults 18+; regulated sale and consumption.
